artifacts.summary: Analysis of 3 axioms in SuccExistence.lean: seed consistency axioms (1-2) are likely provable via WitnessSeed.lean proof pattern; F-step axiom (3) requires more analysis but semantic argument is sound

partial_progress.details: Analyzed provability of all 3 axioms under reflexive semantics with T-axioms

findings.key_insight: Deferral seeds are simpler than discreteImmediateSuccSeed because they lack blocking formulas; proof pattern from forward_temporal_witness_seed_consistent can be adapted
